validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.otpNumeric: The code must contain only numbers

forgotPassword.title: Recover your access to MediConnect

header.cancelTitle: Do you want to cancel the process?
header.cancelWarning: If you leave now, you will lose your current progress and have to start over.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter it below to confirm your email:

passwordSuccess.title: Done! Your password has been updated.

resetPassword.title: Set your new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm a secure password to keep your account protected.

registerRole.title: Your health, your role, your connection.
